author: aaydinks
message:
fix(ai-quiz): cap verify payload question length (#10026)

The verify endpoint rejects questions longer than 500 characters.
Trim the question payload to the server limit to avoid blocking quiz attempts.

Fixes #10019

Co-authored-by: Cursor <cursoragent@cursor.com>

author: vimlinuz
message:
Fix EEA blockchain environment link (#10098)

* Fix EEA blockchain environment link

* fix: rename Arbitrum label to Base under L2 Blockchains

* fix: correct mislabeled nodes in blockchain graph

- Rename 'Moonbeam / Moonriver' to 'Starknet' (content was about Starknet)
- Rename 'Binance Smart Chain' to 'BNB Chain' (rebranded, content already used new name)
- Previous fix: rename 'Arbitrum' to 'Base' (content was about Coinbase Base L2)
